description: 67M acute chest pain — designed to trigger all 6 agents during a 5-minute demo pitch

beats.speaker: doctor
beats.text: Good morning. I'm Dr. Chen. What brings you in today?

beats.speaker: patient
beats.text: I've had chest pain for about two hours. It started suddenly while I was gardening.

beats.speaker: doctor
beats.text: Can you tell me your age and any medical history?

beats.speaker: patient
beats.text: I'm 67 years old. I have hypertension — been on lisinopril for years.

beats.speaker: patient
beats.text: Yes, I take warfarin for a heart valve replacement I had three years ago.

beats.speaker: doctor
beats.text: Any shortness of breath, nausea, or pain radiating to your arm or jaw?

beats.speaker: patient
beats.text: A little short of breath, but no nausea. The pain does go to my left arm.

beats.speaker: doctor
beats.text: Any allergies to medications we should know about?

beats.speaker: patient
beats.text: I'm allergic to penicillin. Had a reaction years ago.

beats.speaker: doctor
beats.text: We'll get an ECG and troponin right away. I'm going to start aspirin and consult cardiology immediately.
